reviews.review_title: Great 🏀 Game, add Free Play Mode
reviews.review_description:
I think this 🏀 Basketball game is excellent and I would give it the highest rating. However, I would really like to see a few new features added so I can play it daily:

1. Free Throw / Custom Hoop Mode
It would be amazing to add a free throw–style mode where we can place a hoop anywhere in our scanned room environment and play freely.

Something similar to the trick shot mode, but more focused on customization and long casual play sessions.
	•	The hoop and backboard should be customizable with any of the models available in the levels.
	•	We should also be able to choose different balls, similar to those available in the level mode.
	•	Basically, a fully personalized hoop setup inside our own room.


2. Bug in Trick Shot Mode
In the trick shot section, after starting a game, the selection beam/laser that appears for choosing objects stays stuck on the hands instead of disappearing.
This is very distracting and interferes with shooting and gameplay. It should be removed once the selection phase is over.

3. More Levels + Free Play Mode
It would be great to have more and newer levels added. Also, please add a “Free Play” mode where we can play levels without a time limit, just for enjoy rather than scoring.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the extensive and detailed review! Sorry for the late reply, we were very busy working on Just Hoops Nano, which was released yesterday.

Your feedback is very valuable, it has been shared with the dev team.

We are preparing a big update for Just Hoops, and we’ll definitely take your comments into account.

Also, as a thank you to players of our games, we created a 30% off promo code for Just Hoops Nano:

REALCAST30-A01CA9

You can use it here: https://www.meta.com/experiences/just-hoops-nano/25552936234380203/

Thanks again for your support, and enjoy the game! 🏀

reviews.review_title: It's arcade basketball in your house!
reviews.review_description:
Simple fun pick up and play game. It's arcade
 basketball. Physics work well once you get used to the "weight" of the ball. Lots to do. Wish multiplayer was active. It's a great game that does what it does well. Definitely worth having in your library

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words! 🏀😊

We’re really happy to hear you’re enjoying the pick-up-and-play arcade feel and that the ball physics clicked once you got used to them. That “arcade basketball at home” vibe is exactly what we set out to create.

We also appreciate the note about multiplayer — it’s feedback like this that helps us understand what players want to see grow in the future. Thanks for supporting the game and for recommending it as a library staple. It truly means a lot to the team! 💙

reviews.review_title: Exactly the type of game I want to play.
reviews.review_description: I just got my Quest 3, and this is one of the first games I bought on sale. I searched "basketball" and checked out my options.  The graphics have a very nice realistic look to them and the physics feel great.  I can make one handed shots, but I still haven't figured out how to grip with both hands and make good shots.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the great review and welcome to Quest 3! 🙌

We’re really glad Just Hoops was one of your first picks and that the visuals and physics are hitting the mark for you. One-handed shots are totally valid (and honestly very satisfying 😄), and two-handed shooting can take a bit of practice to get the feel just right.

Keep experimenting and taking shots at your own pace; you’ll find what works best for you. Thanks again for jumping in and for sharing your experience, and enjoy sinking those buckets! 🏀

reviews.review_description: It’s a cool little basketball game but I don’t like the control of the ball i ￼can’t shoot the ball way I want..  the ball keep sliding out the back out my hands ￼ the game have potential, but it just doesn’t work ￼

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your honest feedback we really appreciate it 🙏

We’re glad you see the potential in the game, and we’re sorry the ball control didn’t feel right for you. Shooting and grip feel are critical in basketball, and feedback like this helps us identify areas for improvement.

We’re actively refining our controls and overall experience, so feedback like yours helps guide that process. Thanks for trying the game and for taking the time to share your thoughts.

reviews.review_description:
Very enjoyable basketball skill game with arcade feel. It’s like having a pop-a-shot hoop in your house, with all types of added effects and modifiers that can only be done in VR.

It’s really fun to work your way up the leaderboard and complete the objectives for stars.

To the developers - amazing work, you nailed it. If there are any future updates or sequels planned - here are my suggestions:

- “Four in a Row” hoops game against friends or AI 

- A “zen mode” where you can just shoot without a timer (or longer timers for less rushed shooting)

- Setting to automatically position your guide hand/ off-hand when grabbing the ball

- New mini-games, hoops and modes

- Add music or media player 

Now that I’m done writing this review, I’m going back to playing 🏀  Five stars!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing review! 🏀⭐

We’re really happy to hear you’re enjoying the arcade feel and that pop-a-shot at home vibe; that’s exactly what we were going for, with a VR twist. Climbing the leaderboards and chasing stars is a big part of the fun, so it’s great to know that’s clicking for you.

A huge thanks as well for taking the time to share such thoughtful suggestions. Modes like a relaxed shooting experience, new mini-games, and social challenges are all ideas we love seeing from the community. Feedback like this genuinely helps shape the future of the game.

Enjoy getting back to the hoops and thanks again for the five stars! 🙌

reviews.review_description:
The game itself looks amazing and has so much potential, but the experience is completely ruined by a major visual glitch. There are constant black lines and severe screen tearing across the display, especially when trying to throw the ball. It’s not a minor issue—it makes the game almost unplayable.

What’s frustrating is that I’ve seen people reporting this problem for at least six months, and it still hasn’t been fixed. Really disappointing because the core gameplay seems fantastic.

developer_response.body:
Hey there! Sorry for the poor experience you had, but we are happy to tell you that we finally fixed the bug ! No more black lines on all headsets !
Thanks for your patience !

reviews.review_description:
Just blown away by this game, its simple controls very colourful sharp graphics noise and fun.

But the real draw is the mixed reality is spot on, it just feels like your at one of those seaside arcades and the value is great with lots and lots of different games and levels.

For once the implementation is actually better than expected,great recommendation !!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We hope that you had fun hoopin' around! 🏀

reviews.review_title: Great game and much fun but can you Make
reviews.review_description: Everything is great fun but can you make setting to limit the height of how high the poles and baskets can be. I'm short and some of the levels the hoops and poles go straight up so high and just to shoot it takes a lot looking way up with your neck and head and it's quite difficult. More so if you have shoulder problems those that are so high you have to raise your arms very high and that's painful. I tried throwin up the ball the non BBall way for those high baskets to make it easier from bottom like at my knee level with palms up but it doesn't work.Thanks

developer_response.body:
Hey there!

Thanks for the review and the feedback regarding your gameplay! We'll make sure to send it across our teams. 🏀

reviews.review_description: I like this game as it gives me the only part of a basketball game I enjoy, which is the shooting part. This is the type of game where you are like I'm only going to play a few minutes, and before you know it, an hour has passed as you want to keep getting a higher score or trying the next level. The shooting feels fantastic, as good as it can be with a controller in VR without a real ball in your hands. Plenty of levels, and custom level design, and MR, really does give this endless fun. Controls only take a few minutes to get use too and once you do this game is a blast.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the detailed review, hope you had a bunch of fun!

reviews.review_description: Great idea, but the actual game/implementation is miserable. A glitchy horrible gameplay. The hands are so buggy it’s unplayable

developer_response.body:
Hey there! Sorry about the issues you are facing but we would love to help you out on this! If you would like to provide more info, please join our Discord and let us know about it so we can help you out!

-> https://discord.com/invite/eHM8PrtzYS

Thank you!

reviews.review_title: It's fun and has a lot of replay value
reviews.review_description:
I love this game. It's a lot of fun, you don't need an internet connection to play solo. You only need to connect online for updates, add-ons, multiplayer, score chart from other players, if you don't care about that stuff like I do, you in for a lot of fun, and if you do care about that stuff, that's good for you too. I wanted to give the game 5 stars, but it's missing just a few quality of life stuff for me. 

1: I don't think you can adjust the game clocks. Once they start going, you just have to make as many baskets as you can in the little amount of time. I always feel like the game is rushing me to the next level. I'm not the biggest fan of beat the clock type games. Your hands can get in the way and knock the basketballs 🏀 away before you grab them 😂 (the ball and hand physics are amazing. please never change them)

2: I was hoping there was some zen type mode, where I setup a hoop anywhere, add a basketball spawner and a clock I can adjust or just turn off, and just practice my hoops and relax. I think something like that is all the game needs.... I love the craziness of the arcade games, but sometimes I just want to chill and hoop. 

Other than that, the game is a must buy at a great price. It's endless fun imo.

developer_response.body: Thanks for this kind and very precise review! And thanks for sharing the idea of zen mode ! We'll have a look at it and see how we could integrate such a feature if more people are interested in it ! For that come to our discord (https://discord.gg/nnauYSrp) and share your opinion !

reviews.review_title: The DEVS blew me away! Top Level 🏀
reviews.review_description: This app really exceeded my expectations. I purchased this awesome mixed-reality app not really knowing much about it. Based on the image I saw I just thought I'd be able to put a hoop up on my wall & toss a ball into it. This blew me away at how expansive it is, how many different variations are included, the soundfx, the silliness, but most of all how much fun it is! I purchased other basketball games on the Quest & in the last year probably played a total of about half an hour of their versions of basketball (not very impressed). With Just Hoops I played 2+ hrs on the first day & have played it every day since. It's one of those apps that it's hard to tear myself away from. I have to constantly remind myself I have 200+ other apps that are getting short shrift because of this fantastic Hoop app :) the basketball is the best looking ball I've seen in VR. The detail is incredible. The balls looks a bit scuffed like they've had plenty of use & the sound effects are super realistic. If you like basketball you'll love this great app 👍

developer_response.body:
Thank you Mike for this wonderful review and very kind comment. 
Your words cheered up our day ! It means a lot to us devs when we see players enjoy the game as much as you do !!

reviews.review_description: One of the best VR games I've ever played. Thank you to the developers for such a great and fun game

developer_response.body: And thank you for the kind words, we really appreciate it! ❤️

reviews.review_description:
Wasn’t sure what to expect, but wow, definitely the best basketball game on the quest, so many arcade modes to play, I went in for a few minutes and ended up playing for over an hour.
Ball and hand psychics are on point.

The added extra of mixed reality just really enhances the game.
I just did not thing I would have this much fun.
Well done to RealCast.
This is going to give so much fun over Christmas.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind review ! Merry XMas !!

reviews.review_title: Hand Tracking is Great but needs work
reviews.review_description: Fun little game. The hand tracking is good but the ball falls out of hands too easily, maybe a light grip would help. Even with controllers when shooting further shots it falls out of your hands easily. The rim lacks a bit of realistic bounce but it's a good game that could benefit from small Tweeks to make it a 5 for $15 its good

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedbacks, we tried hard to make the grib between the ball and the gloves as good as possible ! 
And thanks for trying the hand tracking input ! It's not easy to master but very enjoyable when you do actually master it.

reviews.review_description: I have had Just Hoops for awhile now and I am super happy to see the Devs have added a "sandbox" mode to let you create and share your own Trickshots and also check out other trickshots created by the community.  This game offers a lot of value, view my thoughts on YouTube, search for the @beardinvr channel.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review and youtube video whitebeardvr !
And don't forget to share your own trickshots with the Community !

reviews.review_description: This game is pure fun. It does get tiring after a short time for me personally but I been playing a small amount daily and absolutely love it!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words !

reviews.review_description: I always forget this is an early access app lab game and not a full release on the main store. Hopefully they will have a full launch in December or January with that MR mode. There are so many themed levels. Only thing I would request is a Quest 3 upgrade with better shadows and texture resolution increase for environments.
App is crashing out

developer_response.body:
Hello JustB_93, can you please connect to our discord and let us know more about the crash?
https://discord.gg/nqKUMxnG

reviews.review_description: I've always loved these types of hoop games in real life and this is about as close as you can get to the real thing. I find myself itching to go back in and play some more, especially to try to get as high as possible on the leaderboard. If you like arcade games and basketball, this is a homerun. When they add different arcade environments and multi-player, this will be even more amazing. I can't wait to play against other people!

I expected this to be a nightmare to use with bare hands but it’s surprisingly robust and works well. It’s easier to play with the controllers of course and you have the choice but why would you when bare hands works so well?

It’s also really fun, and again surprisingly, good exercise if you want it to be!

Some of the touches are great mimicking an arcade and interacting with a machine to get started.

Great onboarding too guiding you through and getting you better.

Anyway, I love it.
Brilliant game, with realistic  physics, a must have if you love arcade basketball and hand tracking games

Played now for a few hours and really enjoyed it. Really polished, great physics.

Much easier with controllers, still a challenge for me so far. Hand tracking is good but needs a little work to make it truly great.

Devs active on Reddit and think when other updates come along 10.99 GBP is a fair price. Certainly cheaper that buying the real thing.

Update: Previous review mentioned a training level locked, contacted team on reddit who patched the issue. Looking forward to trying it again.

Looking forward to multi-player and toybox (which i assume is like sandbox choosing the level type and possibly even duration). 

Note: This is a shooting game only, it's not a full basketball experience, which is fine for me.

developer_response.body: Hello, thanks for the complete feedback and follow up. We have already exchanged on the Reddit :) We understand that hand-tracking is a challenge, but we see that you have made good scores, and you have surely progressed by playing regularly, congratulations! Indeed, virtual basketball is a new paradigm for the brain that requires an adaptation time, but the pleasure is worth the time spent! This is just the beginning; new modes and levels are under development, as this game has a lot of potential to be further expanded!

reviews.review_title: Not worth the money Want a Refund
reviews.review_description: Me and my dad play basketball and this is nothing like it at all. First you had to go through stupid courses like dice stacking which was annoying. Then the hand tracking was horrendous even in great lighting and the controllers aren’t even better you couldn’t even use right form to shoot like in real life with either hands or controllers it might of been decent if your hand had any grip on them or the ball but no. the ball was also glitchy. I might of not been angry if it wasn’t 15 DOLLARS. This is my final thoughts on the game.

developer_response.body: Hey Speedexpert, the new update (1.3) is out with a ton of new levels totaling 45 levels and 14 challenges. We also improved the controls, now you can grab the ball with a trigger. There is also a passtrough mode to play in your real environment. Try it and let us know. If you like it, please update your review. Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
Love the setting of this game and can't wait until they expand it out to take advantage of the surrounding space.  Like an old school (but updated) arcade!  

Fun game and very challenging.  Played a couple of times for over an hour each time and really enjoy the mechanics and the physics.  Very forgiving rim which is good.  Much easier with the controllers but super fun with hand tracking and am impressed with the team's ability to get this to be controller free.  Liked the progression and unlocks.  Would be fun to play with friends standing next to you like a real 'pop a shot'.

Kudos to the team for a cool game.  Will you be updating it regularly?

developer_response.body: Hello, thanks for the great feedback and support! We love to see the feedback and understand how you play our game. We are working on the updates and especially the online mode with the possibility to challenge friends or competitors remotely in real time. There will also be new levels and unlockable items. Follow us and keep playing!

reviews.review_title: Congrats to the team! So much fun!
reviews.review_description:
In da hoop is realistic, challenging  and addictive. Physics are great.  Environnment feels so 80’s! The whole family loves it. 
Can’t wait to play online with a In Da Hoop community.

developer_response.body: A big thank you, it's a pleasure! We are working to give you even more content and ways to have fun!

reviews.review_description:
Really nice and clear graphics on quest2. So far I only tested it with controller and like the throwing mechancs. 
Playing with friends in the same room would be the only thing that I miss at the moment. But this seems to be on the devs roadmap

developer_response.body: Thanks for the compliments, the team is thrilled! The online mode is in development as priority n°1, thanks to your opinions too! Keep practicing in solo mode to face your friends!

reviews.review_description: This is really fun, but sometimes the physics is frustrating. If I could hold the ball by pressing the trigger, that might be easier. Just an idea. Anyway, looking forward to future updates to improve this game, I love it.

developer_response.body:
Hey jc3113 
The new update (1.3) is out with a ton of new levels and improvements. We have improved the controls, now you can grab the ball with a trigger. There is also a "passtrough" mode to play in your real environment. Try it, we hope you like it. Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
**Updating my review to mention the hand tracking option which would be a game changer for this game doesn’t seem to be working, at least on quest 3 at the moment, would love to get an update or any input on when that might be sorted**


Polished, well done, and a nice little workout. Did the trial not expecting to actually buy the full game but was having so much fun I couldn’t resist
Pretty fun game. Son enjoys quite a bit.

This game is a lot of fun, you can shoot with barehands or with controllers and it has nice arcade vibes. I can spend a lot of time trying to climb the leaderboards. Physics of hands and ball interaction could improve, now it's a bit floppy but I'm sure it will improve in future updates.

developer_response.body: Hey emart_11 You are one of our highest ranked players and winner of Summer Games :). You probably discovered the new update (1.3)  with new levels and improvements, notably the controls, now you can grab the ball with a trigger. There is also a "passtrough" mode to play in your real environment. Feel free to give us your feedback and update your review. Thank you!

reviews.review_title: Simple, and that makes it amazing!
reviews.review_description: This game is great for anyone, lots of fun guaranteed and never get bored of it! Would highly recommend.

This game is way overpriced. It should be free and have way better mechanics. The mechanics on how to shoot sucks! If you already play basketball and looking for a game to play in VR that would be realistic, this is certainly not the game for you. You have to throw with both hands; no way near shooting a basketball correctly. Don’t get this game, it hasn’t been updated for months, and I don’t know what the developers were thinking. Just a horrible game!


After the developers have responded to my old review, I guess it wouldn’t be right to give them no credit. They are the only basketball game on the market to have hand tracking available and working. I’m very sorry that I have given the developers no credit whatsoever, even though they have accomplished so many things in he making of this game. I hope the developers see this and happy to hear that I have changed my view on this game!

developer_response.body:
Hi Tibinator2005, the last update was in March and developers are working on new big update including multiplayer online that takes little more time than few months. This is the only game on the market where you can throw the ball with bare hands, using hand tracking technology to simulate real physics with both hands like in real basketball. Thousands of players have achieved high scores with bare hands and controllers. We regret that you don't like the game, have you tried to beat some scores, how much time have you spend in the game ?

Hey Tibinator2005, thank you for taking into account our reply to reconsider your rating, it's important for us. We hope the next update will give you more pleasure to play and compete with other players. It will take some time (a few months), but we are excited about the new features we are adding. We'll keep you posted. Thanks for your support and patience!

reviews.review_title: 怎么闪退的问题一直不解决？还真心不如盗版
reviews.review_description: 我当初玩盗版的这游戏觉得挺好的想着给别人钱让他们帮我买这游戏，没想到买了以后玩第一关没有多久就闪退直接退出应用了，反馈一次无果，第二次我今天又玩以为会改进没想到还是个样，我当初买这游戏做啥？即便退款也不是退我那里，本以为quset3的v65版本能有效解决这个闪退问题没想到我想多了，开发者你事先没有测试一下这游戏就上架吗？对了我qq1358142366,我会让你看一下视频，我敢保证我每次上线玩一两分钟一定会闪退，没有一次例外没有完全没有例外过，不是我要贬低你们的游戏，而是确实碰到问题，游戏是好游戏但是问题确实很烦人

developer_response.body:
Hello linzhaobin, can you please connect to our discord and let us know more about the crash? Thanks
https://discord.gg/nqKUMxnG

reviews.review_description: Brings back memories of playing basketball games in the arcade. I enjoy the different games you can play and look forward to the multiplayer feature in the future. It’s awesome seeing your fingers move with the hand tracking. Graphics are good. I do like the weighted feel of the controllers when shooting to give a better sense of actually grabbing onto a basketball.

I love this, it’s like having the arcade machine right in your home. I love the different modes too. Please add a feature where we can place basketball goals(different types) around our home to shoot at freely. That would take this game to the next level.

reviews.review_title: Pull Up! JUST HOOPS is too fun
reviews.review_description: Playing JUST HOOPS is a blast. The hand recognition when picking up and shooting the ball is mind-blowing and hyper-realistic. It’s crazy that I can watch basketball on the TV while shooting hoops from the comfort of my couch.
Enjoyed myself playing and using the hand tracking in this game, highly recommended if you enjoy arcade style basketball

I loved playing this game in the arcades back in the '80s & '90s and now it is just as fun playing it in VR.  

Love the look of this game taking place inside an arcade!  

There are still a few glitches that happen at random times but once those are fixed, this game will be a "must have" for anyone playing VR.

developer_response.body: Hey JeffRichards You migh have discovered the new update (1.3) with new levels and improvements, notably the controls, now you can grab the ball with a trigger. There is also a "passtrough" mode to play in your real environment. Feel free to give us your feedback and update your review. Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
Fun ✅
Single Player ✅
Multiplayer ✅
Mixed Reality Mode ✅
Multiple Themes ✅
Multiple Game Modes ✅
Great Graphics ✅
Great Physics ✅

I absolutely love this game, it's so much fun, and so enjoyable. I've spent many hours already playing, but man my arms are sore. But well worth the pain!!! 
There's so much to do, so many different game modes, a handful of different themes currently. Multiplayer mode and best if all the mixed reality mode. I've shot some hoops while sitting back on my couch watching the cricket!!! Can't get much better than that. 

Well worth the money, and this game should be on the main store, not sitting back hidden in the app lab.
